## What changed

Describe the stack, behavior, or documentation being changed and why.

## Safety checklist

- [ ] I reviewed `git diff` and `git diff --cached` for personal or sensitive values.
- [ ] Domains, addresses, paths, usernames, and credentials are sanitized examples.
- [ ] I installed the pre-commit hooks or ran `pre-commit run --all-files`.
- [ ] I ran `./scripts/validate.sh` when Docker Compose was available.
- [ ] I updated the relevant README for changed variables, ports, volumes, or networks.
